widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryText(pos=(0, 0), size=(96, 96), font=1, color = 0x00ffffff, color_sel = 0x00ffffff, backcolor_sel = None, flags = RT_HALIGN_CENTER|RT_VALIGN_CENTER|RT_WRAP, text = 2), MultiContentEntryText(pos=(100, 0), size=(520, 96), font=0, color = 0x00ffffff, color_sel = 0x00ffffff, backcolor_sel = None, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER|RT_WRAP, text = 1), ], "fonts": [gFont("xstreamityregular", 36), gFont("klass", 64)], "itemHeight": 96, "scrollbarMode": "showNever" }
